author: Chàra Rose
description: Crafty is an open source Minecraft control panel built using Tornado and AdminLTE, featuring server scheduling, a interactive console and the ability to run almost any type of Minecraft server
tagline: Take control of your Minecraft servers.
release_notes:
- Crafty 4.4.11 is the configured image release from the upstream GitLab project.
- No GitHub changelog is available for this app because Crafty publishes releases from GitLab.
title: Crafty
